title: US Treasury Sanctions Iranian Officials
detail: The US Treasury's OFAC designates six Iranian officials responsible for the protest crackdown, including Interior Minister Eskandar Momeni and IRGC Intelligence chief Majid Khademi. OFAC also sanctions criminal investor Babak Zanjani for embezzling billions in oil revenue and providing financial backing for IRGC projects. The sanctions freeze all US-held assets of the designated individuals.

title: Iran Declares 'Active Deterrence' Doctrine
detail: Iran's Defense Council publicly declares that Tehran has adopted a new doctrine of 'active and unprecedented deterrence,' no longer considering itself limited to responding only after an attack. Chief of Staff Abdolrahim Mousavi states that 'objective signs of threat' will now be incorporated into Iran's security calculus, marking a shift from a defensive to an offensive posture following the 2025 Twelve Day War.

title: IRGC Repositions Air Defense Units
detail: Satellite imagery and analyst reports indicate the IRGC is repositioning units responsible for air defense, missile operations, and internal security. Heightened activity at several IRGC bases includes movement of S-300 batteries and mobile missile launchers near Natanz and Isfahan. Analysts note the measures are consistent with standard tension-response protocols aimed at reducing vulnerability.
